narrative: Regional fintech (87 employees) running AWS Lambda, PostgreSQL, Stripe. Domain has appeared in two historical breaches. An exploitable Lambda CVE (CVE-2026-10234, CVSS 9.8) is publicly weaponised, and a Grandoreiro banking-trojan campaign is targeting North American fintechs. An expert would expect: Intelligence to flag at least the banking-trojan + Lambda PoC pulses; Validator to surface CVE-2026-10234 with exploit_available=true and map to T1190; Hardening to rotate the MTD port map; Investigator to publish a posture around 48 (Grade D); Remediator to propose blocking the suspicious IP and forcing MFA; Supervisor to approve with conditional confidence given the elevated risk.
